title: Weekly Insights Review
summary:
Read here everything you need to know


Russia's seaborne crude oil flows are trying to find new destination countries, while the US has already set an embargo on Russian oil. Russia's seaborne crude oil flows are trying to find new destination countries, while the US has already set an embargo on Russian oil. Read More

A risk-on tone across markets saw commodities erase earlier losses to end the week higher
A risk-on tone across markets saw commodities erase earlier losses to end the week higher.

children.title: A risk-on tone across markets saw commodities erase earlier losses to end the week higher
section_path: A risk-on tone across markets saw commodities erase earlier losses to end the week higher
children.section_path_text: A risk-on tone across markets saw commodities erase earlier losses to end the week higher
children.summary: A risk-on tone across markets saw commodities erase earlier losses to end the week higher. This was supported by rising expectations of stimulus measures in China which saw industrial commodities rebound strongly.

children.title: Energy markets gained amid concerns of further supply disruptions
section_path: Energy markets gained amid concerns of further supply disruptions
children.section_path_text: Energy markets gained amid concerns of further supply disruptions
children.summary: Energy markets gained amid concerns of further supply disruptions. That was offset by concerns of inflation-induced slowdown in economic activity, which weighed on sentiment across metals and agriculture sectors.

children.title: We should not forget that the Fed continues to be the "only game in town"
section_path: We should not forget that the Fed continues to be the "only game in town"
children.section_path_text: We should not forget that the Fed continues to be the "only game in town"
children.summary: Last week saw the best performing week since November 2020 for equities, after the Fed's Minutes suggested that the Fed will not be more aggressive than already anticipated.

children.title: The extensive dependency on many Russian exports, most notably within the energy sector, has seen the agreements and implementations taking time
section_path: The extensive dependency on many Russian exports, most notably within the energy sector, has seen the agreements and implementations taking time
children.section_path_text: The extensive dependency on many Russian exports, most notably within the energy sector, has seen the agreements and implementations taking time
children.summary: The Russian assault on Ukraine has passed the 100 days mark, and no end to the conflict appears to be in sight.

children.title: Low inventories amid ongoing disruptions pushed most sectors higher.
section_path: Low inventories amid ongoing disruptions pushed most sectors higher.
children.section_path_text: Low inventories amid ongoing disruptions pushed most sectors higher.
children.summary: Mixed economic data failed to impact sentiment in commodity markets, with supply side issues taking centre stage. Low inventories amid ongoing disruptions pushed most sectors higher.

children.title: Imports from Indonesia have remained the primary source of imports and Russia the second largest source of imports
section_path: Imports from Indonesia have remained the primary source of imports and Russia the second largest source of imports
children.section_path_text: Imports from Indonesia have remained the primary source of imports and Russia the second largest source of imports
children.summary: China's April coal import data by origin was recently released and shows that imports from Indonesia have remained the primary source of imports and Russia the second largest source of imports.
